item.title: A Third Blue Moon Typhoon Dump, Sound On Please
item.description:
#1 10/10 would let her manage my tasks ;)
#2
#3 Just like me *sniffles proudly*
#4 A bit confusing at first but holy shit
#5 Hell yes
#6
#7 Watch until the end
#8
#9 Big baby
#10 Smol baby
#11 *emos in Japanese*
#12 This is me
#13
#14
#15 If you're reading this, what's your favorite Sabaton/metal song?
#16 I identify as a terror (lovingly) to those I harass most (lovingly)
#17 Impeccable comedic timing and everything with these two
#18
#19
#20
#21 The good life
#22 HELL YES
#23 Also me. Also his voice is quite nice.
#24 I feel conflicted because on the one hand, I grew up with Blues Clues...on the other hand this is funny as shit
#25 me, once more
#26 I'm A trying to get to B
#27 SINLESS STEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEVVVVEEE!
#28 There's another one like this somewhere, but I don't know the song. It goes something like Brrbbrrb Brrbrrbb brr dun dun dun dun dun dun Uh. Uh. Uhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhh S...something like that...
#29 YAS QUEEN
#30 vIoLeNcE Viral Edit: Thank you! Hope you all enjoyed very much. Send me your cats!
item.dc:creator: BlueMoonTyphoon

item.title: But... but... muh bible...
item.description: EDIT: Happy Wednesday Frontpage, Imgurians! I hope you all have a nice week! I do some reviews as a hobby, this week I've reviewed "Monster Hunter Rise" and you can watch it here! https://youtu.be/7HMhDxrS2Bc if you're interested in my other reviews, check https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: Aerial view of a controlled burn
item.dc:creator: DOcelot1

item.title: This actually happened to me IRL
item.description: Most viral edit: Thanks for the accolades and upvotes, my dudes! Note: English is not my first language so I’ll keep it brief and not get rant-y like I usually do -This is a class war, always has been. -There is no such thing as a good billionaire in a society where school lunch debt is also permitted to be exist. Bonus Note: 1 million seconds = 11 days 1 billion seconds = 31 years Keep that in perspective when they talk about philanthropy and charity pledges. Original post: My coworkers who buy into company propaganda also happen to be billionaire defenders……funny how that lines up. 2 of them believe that “billionaires are different from regular people because they have vision to see the bigger picture, and so it makes sense that they get rewarded at that scale.” Another one thinks that giving to the less fortunate will teach them to rely on the handouts, and it’s good thing that the wealth is concentrated otherwise it would be wasted. If you’re wondering, I live in Texas. Everything is bigger here, including the cognitive dissonance and ignorance. I fucking hate billionaire apologists and this state is stuffed full of them. Mfs can’t afford the tolls to work but will defend elon over their own kids.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: A longer selection of memes
item.description: Hey, did you know my sole reason for meme posting is to get you to listen to my band? Help a shameless musician out by listening to the songs on mute 2-3000 times while doing the dishes. https://open.spotify.com/artist/19ptBf1ldxSQLo60aDiso7?si=P1bBQOm7SDGGyztTkuqEuw Best regards - me

item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.description:
I honestly don't know what "the band" is supposed to be.
It might be a fun pot luck idea to do this with normal sandwich ingredients and put a cut square between two condimented slices of bread.
My opening hands are always peanut butter, no jelly, cereal, no milk, red cards, only forests
It was super effective!
item.dc:creator: stonetemplefox05

item.title: What Happened Today #152
item.description: Trump has turned defiance into a luxury many can't afford. Vote against his agenda and your political career is over, edit an interview in a way he dislikes and face endless lawsuits, defy his immigration crackdown and he'll threaten to deport you even if you're the world's richest man. The calculation is working because when resistance costs everything, many people choose survival over principle. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at https://govbrief.today or find us on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/israel-hamas-ceasefire-offered 2. https://go.govbrief.today/climate-reporting-website-scrubbed 3. https://go.govbrief.today/noaa-climate-defunded 4. https://go.govbrief.today/cities-sue-obamacare-changes 5. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-tours-camp 6. https://go.govbrief.today/feds-prosecute-cnn 7. https://go.govbrief.today/ssa-immigrants-unverified 8. https://go.govbrief.today/upenn-bans-trans-women-sports 9. https://go.govbrief.today/missile-funding-af1 10. https://go.govbrief.today/ukraine-munitions-paused 11. https://go.govbrief.today/senate-passes-megabill 12. https://go.govbrief.today/tva-members-nominated 13. https://go.govbrief.today/doj-revoke-naturalized-citizenship 14. https://go.govbrief.today/habba-nominated-nj-4years 15. https://go.govbrief.today/former-agent-jan6-justice-dept 16. https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-office-location-changed 17. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-blocked-usdaf 18. https://go.govbrief.today/lara-trump-endorsed 19. https://go.govbrief.today/haitian-tps-temp-protected 20. https://go.govbrief.today/house-dhs-overspending 21. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-deport-mamdani-musk 22. https://go.govbrief.today/suri-remains-free 23. https://go.govbrief.today/HHS-firings-temp-halted 24. https://go.govbrief.today/paramount-pays-trump-$16M 25. https://go.govbrief.today/hhs-cancels-nature Yesterday's Top Story - https://go.govbrief.today/bush-obama-usaid Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/states-sue-medicaid-data Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com ***Imgur Reminder - I have no access to chat. I need to chase after that again this week***
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Hide-n-Seek
item.description: Sorry, no Tia Tax today... I'm afraid we had to rush Bean to the emergency vet late last night to have her checked over. TL;DR, $700 vet bill later, we know she's got an infection and it was messing with her, so she's going to be under the weather for a few days. When she's doing better (and we've had a chance to rest) I'll get some more Tiabeanie tax. Quick shout out to CritterAid here in BC, who helped us. Otherwise we'd never have been able to get her checked out so quickly. Absolute legends.
item.dc:creator: TheUnnamedPoet

ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Nothing Comares to You (Cover) - Chris Cornell YouTube: https://youtu.be/IuUDRU9-HRk?si=KrVFWdbNPkzz08Zt Spotify:https://open.spotify.com/track/0tUELgOuOJ3KCsYMDDsNvD?si=5b3b9eaba16e40cd

Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

item.title: Second hand dump
item.description:
This is actually the reason I know about legba
Tried the casual thing , thought I could handle it. Turns out I cannot. Let's vomit out those feelings and press on
Still waiting for contrast MRI results
Let's hope it's not glial cell cancer
Let's av it
You are loved Have a great day guys
item.dc:creator: UnsweetenedAlmond
